subject: Add share modal with copy-link and social options
description: Campaign page has a share button but no modal. GoFundMe shows share options (copy link, Facebook, Twitter, email). Build a Dialog-based share modal triggered by the share button. Use Web Share API where available, fallback to copy-to-clipboard with toast confirmation. Include campaign title + URL in the share payload. Reuses our existing Dialog and Sonner components.

changes: Created ShareModal.jsx with 4 share options (copy link, Twitter/X, Facebook, email)
Web Share API integration for mobile devices with clipboard fallback
Replaced inline clipboard copy in CampaignPage with modal trigger
Used non-deprecated lucide icons (Send, Share2) instead of Twitter/Facebook
